discrepancy_analysis: UNABLE_TO_EVALUATE. The question asks about fold change in GLI1 in S462 cells treated with sonidegib from Supplementary Figure 16c. The reported value is ~0.33 (reduction, n=3). The model was unable to evaluate this because Supp Fig 16c source data was not present in MOESM10 (the supplied supplementary data file). Without access to the underlying numerical source data, the model cannot independently reproduce the fold-change value. This is a missing-data situation rather than a genuine analytic discrepancy; the model cannot confirm or refute the reported result.
proposed_fix: Locate the source data file containing the GLI1 qPCR/expression values for S462 cells treated with sonidegib (Supp Fig 16c). This may be in a different supplementary file (e.g., MOESM other than MOESM10) or may need to be extracted from the figure directly. Once the numerical source data are available, compute fold change relative to vehicle/DMSO control for n=3 replicates.
